summary: Tested three bug fixes for LawFlow: (1) Case delete crash due to React hooks violation - printingHistory useState moved before early return; (2) Duplicate cases in Upcoming Hearings section - coveredCaseIds Set added to filter duplicates; (3) Firm dashboard Team Workload showing member names instead of phone numbers. All three fixes verified via backend tests (8/8 pass) and Playwright UI tests.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Unexpected text node: A text node cannot be a child of a <View>' - pre-existing issue, not related to current fixes

BUG1_case_delete_crash.evidence: Case detail screen (TEST-DEL-FINAL) loaded at /cases/TEST-DEL-FINAL without crash. Delete button visible. After clicking delete, navigated back to /cases list. No React hooks violation errors in console.
BUG1_case_delete_crash.code_check: printingHistory useState is at line 123 (before early return at line 175). All useState hooks called unconditionally before any conditional returns.

BUG2_duplicate_upcoming_hearings.evidence: Code review confirms coveredCaseIds Set at lines 373-376 of index.tsx. Backend hearings/cases APIs return no duplicate IDs. Dashboard Upcoming section shows items once only. TEST-DUP-001 created with both case nextHearingDate and hearing on same day to trigger scenario - no duplicates observed.
BUG2_duplicate_upcoming_hearings.code_check: const coveredCaseIds = new Set(upcomingHearings.map((item: any) => item.case.id)); filter includes && !coveredCaseIds.has(c.id)

BUG3_firm_dashboard_member_names.evidence: Firm Dashboard Team Workload section shows 'Adv. Rahul Sharma' as primary text (not phone number '9876543210'). Backend GET /api/firms/dashboard returns name field enriched from advocates collection. Frontend renders m.name || m.phone.
BUG3_firm_dashboard_member_names.code_check: firms.py /dashboard endpoint fetches advocate_docs from db.advocates and enriches both workload dict and enriched_members with name. firm-dashboard.tsx renders m.name || m.phone at line 130.

seed_data_creation: Created TEST-DUP-001 case with hearing for BUG 2 testing (later deleted during BUG 1 test). Created TEST-DEL-FINAL for BUG 1 delete test (deleted as part of test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three bug fixes from this iteration verified working. User 9876543210 / OTP 123456. Firm 'Sharma and Associates' exists for user. printingHistory useState is now at line 123 in cases/[id].tsx (before early return). Dashboard deduplication via coveredCaseIds Set is in place in index.tsx. Firm dashboard correctly shows advocate names via backend enrichment. One pre-existing minor issue: 'Unexpected text node: A text node cannot be a child of a View' warning in console (not related to fixes).
